description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard display box with open top and cut-out handles on the sides, designed for holding and displaying products. The exterior is brightly printed with the Chabrior brand, featuring a red and white color scheme on the longer sides and a blue and yellow wheat motif on the shorter sides. The front and back panels display the Chabrior logo prominently, with additional text and wheat graphics. The shorter sides include photographic images and more branding, suggesting it is used for food products, likely in a retail or urban market setting. The box is lightweight, with visible flaps and slots for structural support, and the interior is plain white. The overall construction is typical of retail product trays used for easy access and visibility of contents.
description: A branded cardboard display box with open top, red and white sides, and wheat graphics, used for retail product presentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Chabrior logo on a red background with wheat graphics and a slogan at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view features a blue and yellow wheat field design, Chabrior logo, and small photographic images.
description_view_2: Back view displays more branding, wheat graphics, and additional text in white on a red background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, with blue and yellow wheat graphics and branding.
